examples.text: قَالَ هِيَ عَصَايَ أَتَوَكَّأُ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِي وَلِيَ فِيهَا مَآرِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
examples.english: He said, "It is my stick. I lean on it, I beat down with it for my sheep, and I have many other uses of it.

senses.gloss: to smile; to make a friendly expression

examples.text: عندما وجدته عرّفته بنفسي، فهشّ في وجهي وقال لي إنّه في خدمتي.
examples.english: When I found him, I made my presence known to him, whereupon he behaved politely towards me and told me he would be in my service.
